criteria.name: AI Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app uses AI to personalize the user experience, including content recommendations, adaptive interfaces, and customized settings.

criteria.name: Content Generation
criteria.description: The app's ability to generate new content, such as images, text, or music, using AI algorithms.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: How well the app keeps users entertained and coming back for more, measured by metrics such as session length, daily active users, and retention rate.

criteria.name: Creative Enhancement
criteria.description: The extent to which the app enhances creativity and allows users to express themselves through AI-powered tools.

criteria.name: AI Chatbot Interaction
criteria.description: The quality and engagement level of AI-powered chatbot interactions within the app.
